label: Text input
era: The white sunken fields of the guestbook form, name, email, homepage, waiting on every page worth visiting.

classes.name: rs-input
classes.role: sunken text input; invalid state gets the 1px red border

a11y: Every field gets a <label for>, never a placeholder standing in for one. Invalid means a red border plus an rs-form-error line tied on with aria-describedby, so the message is more than a color.
